div.head: 101. Editorial Note
div.p: Between March 8 and 10, Director of the International Cooperation Administration Hollister attended a Mission Directors Conference in Habana, Cuba, where he discussed with them the status of ICA programs in the respective Latin American countries. Memoranda of these conversations, drafted by the Executive Secretary of the ICA, John W. McDonald, and bearing drafting dates between April 5 and 9, are in Washington National Records Center, ICA Director’s Files, FRC 61 A 32, Box 316, Latin America.
